creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Created attachment 181792
sysutils/jdupes shar archive

Port for sysutils/jdupes - a utility for quickly finding and managing duplicate files.  As the name suggests, it's a fork of fdupes - https://github.com/jbruchon/jdupes

It's quite fast: http://www.virkki.com/jyri/articles/index.php/dupd-vs-jdupes-take-2/
